tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-cli-components
tasks.task:
Fix all @typescript-eslint/explicit-function-return-type violations in the following files:
- src/cli/components/TaskRow.tsx
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/OutputPanel.tsx
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/PermissionPanel.tsx
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/WorkflowPanel.tsx
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/index.tsx
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/usePermission.ts
- src/cli/components/parts/PipelineRunner/usePipelineRun.ts

Add explicit return type annotations to all functions and arrow functions that are missing them. These are Ink (React CLI) components and hooks — use JSX.Element for render functions and appropriate types for hooks. Use mcp__perclst__ts_analyze to inspect each file's structure and mcp__perclst__ts_get_types to confirm correct types. After editing, run `./node_modules/.bin/eslint src/cli/components/` to verify no violations remain in these files.

tasks.command: npm run build && npm run test:unit

tasks.name: implement-lint-fix-explicit-return-type-cli-components
tasks.task: Return types added and build/tests passing. Commit the changes with an appropriate conventional commit message (e.g. fix(lint): add explicit return types to cli/components).
